nodes.label: AI as research accelerator
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable source requiring full manual verification
nodes.grounding_span: I use it as a quick way to visually see a lot of useful information, but still need to manually check it is correct

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: It offered names that were made up and also more and more duplicates

nodes.label: AI output quality and appropriateness
nodes.label_negative: AI output quality degradation after initial results
nodes.grounding_span: The first 50 were mostly good and were accurate... When I asked for more the quality started dipping

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of frustration due to poor data
nodes.grounding_span: It has improved our overall efficiency to a decent level

nodes.label: AI as complement to human-centered work
nodes.label_negative: Passive reliance on AI without verification
nodes.grounding_span: I don't feel like a passenger with the work and still feel like I need to be actively involved

nodes.label: Accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: the accuracy of data is very important

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: It has improved our overall efficiency to a decent level

nodes.label: Professional autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I don't feel like a passenger with the work

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for initial lead generation
nodes.grounding_span: I was satisfied recently when it helped me locate a lot of ASL teachers that quickly

nodes.label: Frustration with AI hallucination
nodes.grounding_span: The most common source of frustration is when it offers poor data

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI
nodes.grounding_span: I can usually trust the initial results will be helpful

nodes.label: Cautious skepticism about AI accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I would prefer it would be completely correct and up to date

nodes.label: Systematic quality monitoring and adaptive query adjustment
nodes.grounding_span: I can see when it is starting this so I will adjust my query if possible

nodes.label: Visual and organizational preference for clean chat separation
nodes.grounding_span: I find it visually better too to start a new chat, a clean page so to speak
